object_a.label: stairs
object_a.description: short carpeted steps leading up to a higher floor area
object_a.long_form_open_description: A small set of two to three carpeted steps with white riser trim and wood-like or carpeted treads, rising from the floor on the right side of the image. Steps have white trim and show slight wear consistent with foot traffic.
